education.title: What is an Organization?
education.description: An organization is your association, federation, or cooperative in the digital voting system.
education.point_1: Your member data is managed here
education.point_2: All elections take place within this organization
education.data_deletion: Deletion after election according to GDPR Art. 17
education.requirements_intro: To represent your organization in a legally sound manner, we need:

form.title: Create Organization
form.step_1_info: After providing this information, we'll ask for your association's address and the chair of the board.
form.step_2_info: This address will be used for legal notices and communication with authorities.
form.step_3_info: After confirmation, you'll receive a confirmation email. You can then invite members and create your first election.
form.name_helper: exactly as in the association register
form.country_info: Public Digit is currently focused on Germany
form.rep_email_helper: If different from the organization address
form.is_self_representative_help: Check this if you are the representative yourself. No separate email will be sent.
form.gdpr_acceptance: I accept GDPR-compliant processing of my data
form.terms_acceptance: I accept Public Digit's Terms of Service
